About 📚 Library ✦ Testimony Outreach Donate Events Prayer Connect

✦ About the Ministry

Abigael Glory Ministries was founded by Besong Lydia Aseck — a Spirit-filled Digital Christian Evangelist called to carry the light of Christ across the internet and into the hardest places of society.

Born out of personal hardship, lack, and an unquenchable burden for souls, Lydia began preaching in her community and launched her Facebook ministry in 2025, quickly reaching over 5,000 followers. Through Gospel Blast, teachings on the Life of Jesus, Journey to Easter, and upcoming projects Abigael and Sophia, the ministry is touching lives across Cameroon and beyond.

5,000+Followers
500+Books Given
∞God's Grace

Grants & prayer for those facing unaffordable hospital bills.

🏠

Orphanage Outreach

Food, clothing, books & worship at orphanages in Yaoundé.

⛓️

Prison Ministry

Bibles, prayer and pastoral care inside correctional facilities.

🙏

Prayer & Intercession

Live online prayer sessions & intercession for all who reach out.

✦ Share Your Testimony

"They overcame by the blood of the Lamb and the word of their testimony."

Has God healed, saved, or turned your situation around? Share your story — it will preach to thousands.

What is your name? 👤

You can use your real name or stay anonymous.

Where are you from? 📍

Your city and country help others connect.

What category is your testimony? 📂

Select the one that fits best.

Tell us what happened 📖

What were you going through? What did God do?

May we share your testimony? 📢

Your story may be shared on this website, Facebook, and in future books.

🌟 Real Testimonies

"

In 2024, during our ministry posting in Nyom, Cameroon, a beloved mama was diagnosed with breast cancer. We gathered and prayed in the name of Jesus. God moved. She was miraculously healed — to this day she stands as a living testimony. All glory to Jesus.

🙏
Mama from NyomNyom, Cameroon · 2024 · Healing
"

In 2023 in Nkolodom, Yaoundé, a taxi driver had been bedridden for two years with a severe foot ulcer. Two weeks after prayer, the ulcer completely dried up and healed. The family offered their home as a church and gave their lives to Christ. A healing became a church.

✨
Anonymous — Taxi DriverNkolodom, Yaoundé · 2023 · Healing

🤲 Outreach & Grants

"The generous will themselves be blessed…" — Proverbs 22:9

Abigael Glory Ministries runs periodic outreach programmes in partnership with hospitals, prisons, orphanages and humanitarian organisations. Distributions are based on available funds — not open for individual applications.

ℹ️

How Our Outreach Works

Periodic · Partner-coordinated · Fund-dependent distributions

Our outreach is conducted periodically in direct coordination with partner hospitals, prisons and humanitarian organisations. Beneficiaries are identified through these partner networks based on funds available at each distribution cycle.

Individual grant applications are not accepted. This protects the dignity of beneficiaries and ensures resources reach the most vulnerable through verified, trusted channels.

🏥
Medical & Hospital
Bills, medications & emergency care via partner hospitals.
🎓
Education
School fees, uniforms & books for vulnerable children.
🍞
Food & Basic Needs
Food packages for families, widows & displaced persons.
⛓️
Prison Outreach
Bibles, books & pastoral support for inmates.

Support the next outreach round — every donation goes directly into the distribution fund.
